faqs.question: What is the best CRM and sales tool for agencies?
faqs.answer: Based on our comprehensive evaluation, HubSpot is the best CRM and sales tool for agencies in July 20. It earned a 4.5/5 rating and excels at meeting the specific needs of digital agencies managing multiple clients who need collaboration, white-labeling, and reporting.

faqs.question: How much does CRM and sales software cost for agencies?
faqs.answer: CRM and sales tools for agencies range from free tiers to enterprise plans. HubSpot starts at Free – custom, while budget-friendly alternatives starting from lower price points are available.

faqs.question: What features should agencies look for in CRM and sales software?
faqs.answer: When evaluating CRM and sales tools for agencies, prioritize pipeline management, contact management, integrations. These factors most directly impact daily productivity and return on investment for agencies teams.

faqs.question: Can agencies use free CRM and sales tools effectively?
faqs.answer: Yes, several CRM and sales platforms offer generous free tiers suitable for agencies. We recommend testing free versions to evaluate fit before committing to paid plans.

faqs.question: What is the easiest CRM and sales tool for agencies to implement?
faqs.answer: Implementation difficulty varies, but HubSpot is known for straightforward setup, making it an excellent choice for agencies teams that want to get started quickly.

faqs.question: How do I choose between different CRM and sales tools for agencies?
faqs.answer: Consider your team size, budget, technical expertise, and specific workflow needs. Our comparison table above shows how each top pick stacks up across key criteria.

faqs.question: Are there CRM and sales tools designed specifically for agencies?
faqs.answer: Yes, many CRM and sales platforms offer features tailored to agencies. Our reviews detail which tools work best for different types of agencies teams.

faqs.question: How often should agencies review their CRM and sales tool choice?
faqs.answer: We recommend evaluating your CRM and sales stack annually or when your team grows significantly. The software landscape evolves rapidly with new features and entrants.

author: PilotStack Editorial Team
body:
Best CRM & Sales Software for Agencies

Find the best CRM and sales tools for agencies. We evaluated the top solutions for digital agencies managing multiple clients who need collaboration, white-labeling, and reporting based on pricing, features, and real user reviews.

Why Trust Our CRM and sales Recommendations for Agencies

Our team has spent hundreds of hours researching, testing, and comparing CRM and sales platforms specifically for agencies. We combine hands-on testing with analysis of thousands of user reviews to deliver unbiased, actionable recommendations.

Each tool was evaluated against 5 key criteria: pipeline management, contact management, integrations, reporting, mobile access. Our methodology ensures comprehensive coverage of what matters most to agencies buyers.

How We Chose the Best CRM and sales Tools for Agencies

Our evaluation process focused on what agencies teams need most: multi-client management, collaboration, white-label options. Each tool was tested in real-world agencies scenarios to ensure our recommendations are practical.

We analyzed user reviews from G2, Capterra, and TrustRadius to validate our findings and ensure our picks reflect real user satisfaction.

What Agencies Should Consider Before Buying CRM and sales Software

Before selecting a CRM and sales platform, evaluate your team size, budget, technical requirements, and specific workflow needs. The right tool should scale with your growth without adding unnecessary complexity.

  • Budget: CRM and sales tools range from free to premium — find the tier that matches your needs.
  • Team size: Some tools shine for small teams while others are built for enterprise scale.
  • Integration requirements: Ensure the tool connects with your existing stack.
  • Support needs: agencies teams benefit from responsive support during implementation.

Top Picks Overview

Best for: Best overall for agencies

Pricing: Free – custom

Pros
